prompt.task: Convert feature idea into implementable PRD for SlideHeroes with Claude Code

project_info.name: SlideHeroes
project_info.type: SaaS Platform for AI-Powered Presentation Creation
project_info.stack: Next.js 15, TypeScript, Supabase, Payload CMS, Portkey AI Gateway
project_info.architecture: Turborepo monorepo with web app (/apps/web/), Payload CMS (/apps/payload/), and shared packages (/packages/)
project_info.patterns: MakerKit-based architecture with server components, server actions, and RLS security

codebase_patterns.components: Prefer Server Components over Client Components
codebase_patterns.actions: Use enhanceAction wrapper for all server actions
codebase_patterns.validation: Zod schemas for all input validation
codebase_patterns.ai_integration: Portkey AI Gateway for all AI requests with usage tracking
codebase_patterns.database: Supabase with Row Level Security (RLS) policies

technical_constraints.security: Always use RLS, never expose API keys, use server actions for AI/external APIs
technical_constraints.validation: Use Zod schemas everywhere for input validation
technical_constraints.components: Prefer Server Components, use enhanceAction for server actions
technical_constraints.testing: Write unit tests for business logic, integration tests for user workflows

step.title: Analyze Feature Scope
step.description: Identify core objectives, target users, and desired outcomes. Consider impact on existing SlideHeroes features (course system, AI tools, kanban board) and technical dependencies.

step.title: Define Technical Requirements
step.description: Specify required libraries, APIs, database changes, and file modifications. Reference existing SlideHeroes patterns for AI integration, user management, and content creation.

step.title: Create Acceptance Criteria
step.description: Define testable criteria that determine feature completion. Include user experience requirements and technical requirements.

step.title: Identify Cross-cutting Concerns
step.description: List shared components, utilities, or patterns that may need updates. Consider authentication, routing, data models, AI usage tracking, and billing implications.

user_stories.story: As a {USER_TYPE}, I want {FUNCTIONALITY} so that {BENEFIT}

cross_cutting_concerns.concern: AI usage tracking and billing implications

input.feature_idea: AI-powered slide title suggestions for presentation editor
input.user_stories: Users want help creating compelling slide titles that match their content
input.business_context: Improve user engagement with AI features and reduce time to create presentations

prd.title: AI Slide Title Suggestions
prd.executive_summary: Enable users to generate AI-powered title suggestions for individual slides in their presentations, improving content quality and reducing creation time

objectives.objective: Provide contextual AI title suggestions based on slide content
Track AI usage for billing and analytics

user_stories.story: As a SlideHeroes user, I want to generate AI title suggestions for my slides so that I can create more compelling and professional presentations

acceptance_criteria.criterion: User can access title suggestions from slide editor
AI generates 3-5 title options within 5 seconds
User can apply suggested title with one click

technical_requirements.database_changes: Extend ai_usage table for title suggestion tracking
technical_requirements.api_endpoints: New server action for title generation
technical_requirements.ai_integration: Portkey AI Gateway with GPT-4 for title generation

cross_cutting_concerns.concern: Error handling for AI service failures

success_metrics.metric: Users apply suggested titles 60%+ of the time
Increase in AI feature usage and user engagement
